body:
Parent issue: #126

Stage: setup-plan-route

## Task

Implement the next small staged child under #126: add the initial explicit `/setup` route with plan-only behavior. Add route parsing/dispatch/docs/tests for `@sepo-agent /setup plan` so it can read a structured Sepo setup issue, inspect current setup/config context where existing helpers make that practical, and produce a proposed setup diff/summary without mutating repository variables or GitHub Projects. Treat setup as privileged/conservative in the route access model, but do not implement `/setup apply` yet. Keep the output focused on allowlisted setup intent such as `AGENT_HANDLE`, assign-to-agent behavior, project-management mode, Project ID/URL/owner/title, and minimal Project planning fields from the setup template. Do not implement repo variable writes, GitHub Project creation/linking, Project field sync, or project-manager field-apply behavior in this child. Preserve behavior from stacked PRs #134, #136, #141, #143, and #145, and add focused tests for route parsing, access/policy behavior, plan-only mutation boundaries, and docs consistency.

## Base

- base_pr: #145

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:126 stage:setup-plan-route state:done parent_round:5 -->
